programmes.show_description: Adventure with Jonathan Rhys Meyers. The tale of James Brooke, the Rajah of Sarawak, who inspired the Rudyard Kipling story The Man Who Would Be King and Joseph Conrad's novel Lord Jim.
Violent crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. When his brother falls foul of a ruthless mobster, a straight-laced man must go against the odds to save him with the help of an old friend.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A dog loses an eye while in kennel care because the animal was allegedly fed out of the same bowl as another pet and a dogfight ensued.
A young vacationer seals his fate when he offers video evidence showing himself sailing over a man's roof on his snowmobile.
A woman and her girlfriend claim ex-roommates backed out of their lease after an air quality issue that sent them all to a hotel.
Divorcees lay out 10K to hire the best possible lawyer for their child then dispute who owes for that costly decision.
A woman with a protective order against her ex-fiancé says she was too scared to call the police when he hit her vehicle with his car.
Armed with a bat and a Pit Bull, a woman's stroll around the block ends with an attack by an unleashed dog and alleged ridicule from the pet's owner.
An assault during a custody exchange at McDonald's takes place after a babysitter serves the mother of her client's children with papers alleging abuse.
A dog-walking dispute escalates into a full-blown assault when a woman pepper sprays a puppy and its owners; she claims they beat her up in return.
A man gets into an altercation with his roommate and claims he was shoved into a television; his roommate accuses him of being drunk and belligerent.

In Colorado, a man claims his brother has murdered his girlfriend. In Michigan, a young couple is found dead in their garden shed.
In Florida, the body of a teen girl is discovered. The police turn to the neighbourhood cameras. In Colorado, the last man to see a missing woman professes his innocence.
A young mother calls 911 claiming she cut her own throat in front of her ex-husband and child. Doctors say there's no way she did it to herself.
When a man is murdered in a bomb blast, investigators sift through the remains to hone in on the bomber. Tiny fragments of plastic hold the key to the case.
A strategically placed plastic bag found near a suffocated woman made her death look accidental. Further investigation revealed the scene was staged.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. When the death of a friend's son is ruled an accident, CD investigates further.
Western with Gregory Peck. An ageing bank robber goes in search of his former partner, who double-crossed him - but finds himself forced to take care of a little girl.
Thriller with Samuel L Jackson. A trained black-ops interrogator and an FBI agent resort to extreme measures to coerce a terrorist to disclose the location of three nuclear devices.
Crime comedy with Sean Connery. Reformed crook Vito has turned over a new leaf, but is forced to abandon the straight and narrow to take part in a robbery planned by his father and his son.
Action thriller with Dolph Lundgren. When a Grand Jury witness is murdered, former government agent Jason Price finds himself caught in a frightening spiral where no one can be trusted.

A man's demeanour in court leads the Judge to rule that she wouldn't let him drive a tricycle let alone a car which he is accused of wrecking.
Unwed parents of a six-year-old girl fight over a tax refund after alleged jail time, job loss and drug possession.
A woman sues her former friend for profits from a litter of pit bulls and for allegedly making a false arrest.
Teenagers rumoured to have a history with the police are accused of damaging their own apartment; their mother is sued for repairs.
A young man insists that he was doing his landlord a favour by ripping out all her kitchen appliances shortly before he moved out.
A woman claims her nephew shot her in the head with a BB gun; her sister claims she broke in and stole her belongings.
A woman's violent past comes back to haunt her when she points the harassment finger at a woman she neglected to pay back for an earlier crime.
After a pizza delivery driver hears a 'thump' while driving, he discovers that a 9-year-old boy accidentally ran into his car while playing in the street.
The Judge states the obvious to make a comparison between a young man who brings his new, half-clothed girlfriend to court out of alleged spite for his ex.

In the UK, a woman is found murdered after reporting stalking. In Texas, a woman is found shot dead outside her home.
In Texas, surveillance catches a killer out. In Washington State, a man's vlogs reveal his dark plans.
Lorenzen Wright was a superstar player in the NBA and a hometown hero. That ended in July 2010 during a call to 911. The chilling recording captured his dying words.
The decomposed bodies of two victims are found in an irrigation canal in Bakersfield, California, but how can a killer be caught if evidence is washed away?
Behavioural profiling can be useful to catch a killer, but it can also be misleading, as police found out in one particular case. DNA put them back on track.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A loan shark, who has a minister's son under his thumb, attempts to steal a charitable telethon's proceeds.
Action comedy with Woody Harrelson. Two New York cops plan to rob a train carrying all the day's takings from the city's subway network, but a pyromaniac serial killer threatens their plans.
Action thriller sequel with Sylvester Stallone. When a member of his team goes missing, Ray Breslin is forced to return to the seemingly impenetrable prison he once escaped from.
